Operation 'coordToRegionCode' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description is too brief and lacks context about input parameters and output structure. Enhanced version clarifies that it performs reverse geocoding, specifies expected input format (latitude/longitude), describes output structure (region code documents with hierarchical divisions), and explains practical use cases for AI agents.

data.current_description: Returns the administrative and legal region codes for the given coordinates.
data.description_suggestion: Performs reverse geocoding to retrieve administrative and legal region codes for the specified coordinates. Accepts latitude and longitude parameters and returns region code documents containing hierarchical administrative divisions (province, city, district, etc.). Useful for determining administrative boundaries and region classification.
data.reasoning: Description is too brief and lacks context about input parameters and output structure. Enhanced version clarifies that it performs reverse geocoding, specifies expected input format (latitude/longitude), describes output structure (region code documents with hierarchical divisions), and explains practical use cases for AI agents.

message: Operation 'transformCoordinates' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too generic and lacks specificity about supported coordinate systems and parameters. Enhanced version clarifies supported systems (WGS84, TM, Bessel), specifies required input parameters (source coordinates, system identifiers), describes output (transformed coordinates), and provides context about Korean coordinate system support for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Converts coordinates from one coordinate system to another (e.g., WGS84 to TM).
data.description_suggestion: Transforms coordinates between different coordinate systems (e.g., WGS84, TM, Bessel). Accepts source coordinates and source/target coordinate system parameters. Returns transformed coordinates in the target coordinate system. Supports multiple Korean coordinate systems for precise location mapping.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and lacks specificity about supported coordinate systems and parameters. Enhanced version clarifies supported systems (WGS84, TM, Bessel), specifies required input parameters (source coordinates, system identifiers), describes output (transformed coordinates), and provides context about Korean coordinate system support for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'searchByCategory' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details. Description mentions search area requirements but lacks clarity about what constitutes x/y/radius and rect parameters. Enhanced version clarifies parameter meanings (circular vs rectangular search), specifies output structure (place documents with relevant fields), and mentions pagination support for better AI agent understanding of how to use this operation and process results.

data.current_description: Searches for places within a specific category group. Requires either x/y/radius or rect to define the search area.
data.description_suggestion: Searches for places within a specified category group across a defined geographic area. Requires either circular search (x/y coordinates with radius) or rectangular search (bounding box coordinates) to define the search region. Returns place documents with details including name, address, phone, and location coordinates. Supports pagination for large result sets.
data.reasoning: Description mentions search area requirements but lacks clarity about what constitutes x/y/radius and rect parameters.
